reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.9.1: stage 2 adds undo/redo to the raster canvas, a prerequisite for making it the main canvas. Undo is region-based: each stroke stores only the changed rectangle's before/after pixels (a 20x20 edit on a 1000x1000 layer costs ~3 KB, not the whole layer), with a bounded memory history. Bound to Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y / Ctrl+Shift+Z plus toolbar buttons.
